title: CornCobs' BareBones Modpack
description: This is based purely on CornCobs's Lively Modpack, except it's the bare minimum. This takes all of the FPS improving mods, and configures them to have the best performance!
body:
![CornCobs](https://i.imgur.com/gK9c3X5.png)
## 📝 Info - [**Socials**](https://slat.cc/connorcorn)
- [**Donations**](https://www.patreon.com/connorcorn07)
- [**My Other Modpacks**](https://modrinth.com/user/ConnorCorn07)
- [**Discord**](https://discord.gg/xFRzWBAfQh)
## 📜 Description I currently run a 9600XT w/ a 9900X CPU, however, I used to be less fortunate, with only having integrated graphics on an i5 CPU. We created this modpack to keep in mind the performance of minecraft without losing quality. Almost our entire library of mods are focused on improving your game's performance! It includes Mods like [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) and [C^2m Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) in order to put less load on your computer and increase frames, while also adding in [Gamma Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/gamma-utils) in order to help QOL while adding some performance benefits behind the scenes. This is the base for all of our modpacks; we may always build them from the ground up, but we will forever keep these mods in mind ## 🔃 Mod Loader Fabric Mod Loader is highly optimized, even more optimized than forge. We would've liked to use Quilt, but sadly, some of the mods dont work with Quilt's engine All versions will be reciving a "Final Update." So far, only 1.20 AND 1.20.2 have recived these updates. CornCobs Barebones will NOT Be supporting 1.20.3 & 1.20.5 because of how little time there was to develop mods inbetween version updates. CornCobs BareBones will ALWAYS support versions 1.20.1 AND 1.21.10 from now on. If you discover a bug on any version that has recived a "Final Update," the bug will not be fixed. ## 📦 Performance Depending on your computer, results may vary This is Minecraft with [CornCob's BareBones Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cornbarebones) downloaded and installed v1.4.0, 2.6k FPS ![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/fRuAkUM.png) This is Pure Vanilla, with the same performance settings turned on 1.20.6, 1k FPS ![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/lcLuCk4.png) As you can see, the performance difference speaks for itself, with a 2.6x difference in the two versions
